LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS EDEN RESTAURANT, LLC, TIMOTHY FELKER AND JASON FOX'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS HAVE SHOWN SUFFICIENT GROUNDS TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT PER CCP 473(B) AND THEIR MOTION IS SUPPORTED BY CALIFORNIA'S STRONG POLICY OF DECIDING CASES ON THEIR MERITS. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT SUFFER ANY UNDUE PREJUDICE BY THE GRANTING OF THE MOTION BECAUSE, AMONG OTHER THINGS, IT HAS OBTAINED A WRIT OF ATTACHMENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =302/HK

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendants Eden Restaurant, LLC, Timothy Felker and Jason Fox's motion to set aside entry of default is granted. Defendants have shown sufficient grounds to set aside the default per CCP 473(b) and their motion is supported by California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits. Plaintiff will not suffer any undue prejudice by the granting of the motion because, among other things, it has obtained a writ of attachment. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
